Uses of Interface
org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.ViewComponentConstants

  • Packages that use ViewComponentConstants 
    Package Description

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the anchor figures based on ellipsoid.
      class  AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the rectangular or squared anchor figures.
      class  AnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This is the anchor that permit to connect EdgeFigure and NodeFigure.
      class  InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a circle frame.
      class  InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a ellipsoid frame.
      class  InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a round rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a square frame.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractFigure
      This class is the base class for basic drawing objects such as rectangles, lines, text, circles, etc.
      class  AbstractModelObjectFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.coercion

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.coercion that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  CoercedBitmapFigure
      Bitmap Figure that is associated to an anchor and located according to the anchor position.
      class  CoercedTextFigure
      Text Figure that is associated to an anchor and located according to the anchor position.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a bitmap.
      class  BlockDecorationFigure
      Abstract class to present a decoration figure as a block.
      class  DecorationFigure
      Abstract class to present a decoration figure.
      class  EllipseFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing an ellipse.
      class  PolylineFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a polyline.
      class  RectangleFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a rectangle.
      class  TextFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a text.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Abstract Figure classe for representing edges between nodes' ports.
      class  PolylineEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a polyline.
      class  SegmentEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a single segment.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a bitmap.
      class  CircleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a circle.
      class  EllipseNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying an ellipse.
      class  NodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Abstract class to present a node in a diagram.
      class  RectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a rectangle.
      class  RoundRectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a round rectangle.
      class  SquareNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a square.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractModelObjectSubFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.
      class  AbstractSubFigure
      This class is the base class all the figures that are linked to other figures such as the anchors inside the nodes.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractViewComponent
      This class is the base class for all the drawable components.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractDirectionBasedFigureLayout
      Abstract implementation of a laying out algorithm that is based on the vertical and horizontal directions.
      class  AbstractFigureLayout
      Abstract implementation of a laying out algorithm.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.basic

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.basic that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BasicGridBagFigureLayout
      Laying out figures on a grid.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.force

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.force that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ForceBasedFigureLayout
      This class provides the implementation of a force-based laying-out algorithm.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.sugiyama

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.sugiyama that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  GanswerSugiyamaFigureLayout
      This class represents the Ganswer-Sugiyama Layout Algorithm.

    • Uses of ViewComponentConstants in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures that implement ViewComponentConstants 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  FSMEndPointFigure
      Figure for the end points of the FSM.
      class  FSMStartPointFigure
      Figure for the start points of the FSM.
      class  FSMStateFigure
      Figure for the nodes of the FSM.
      class  FSMTransitionFigure
      Figure for the transitions of the FSM.
